title: symphyotrichum racemosum
intro: Symphyotrichum racemosum, also known as panicled aster, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. Symphyotrichum racemosum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
